CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2021 Off Calendar

Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Award Of Attorneys Fees, Reimbursement Of Litigation Costs, And Enhancement Award
Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jose Patino, Esq. (310-888-7771; jose@setarehlaw.com) of Setareh Law Group for Plaintiff, Donna Trevethan.
Douglas Clifford, Esq. (dclifford@wilsonturnerkosmo.com) of Wilson Turner Kosmo LLP for Defendant, Target Corporation.
Timmothy Nelson, Esq. (916-960-2211; tim@medinamckelvey.com) of Medina Mckelvey LLP for Defendant, Big Orange Productions, Inc.

DISCUSSED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The court notes no class memeber appear for hearing. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DONNA TREVETHAN's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Award Of Attorneys Fees, Reimbursement Of Litigation Costs, And Enhancement Award is GRANTED. No member of the class opted out of or objected to the proposed settlement, and it meets the requisite standards.

Compliance hearing set for June 6, 2022 at 9:30am in dept 302. Parties to file a declaration re status of distribution prior to this hearing date.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Atty. Tim Nelson, Esq., 916.960.2211, for Defendant Big Orange.

PLAINTIFF DONNA TREVETHAN's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Certification Of Settlement Class.

Matter called. The Court states that it has read the supplemental declaration.

Discussions regarding the final approval hearing date are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Final Approval Hearing is set for September 14, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302. The Court notes that the motions for attorney's fees would be set per the statutory guidelines. A report from the settlement administrator is to be on file no later than September 9, 2021.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Certification Of Settlement Class; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Continued To Apr-14-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Thomas Segal, Esq. of Setareh Law Group, 310.888.7771, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Doug Leach, Esq. of Medina McKelvey LLP, 916.920.2211, appearing for Defendant Big Orange;
Atty. Douglas Clifford, Esq., appearing for Defendant Target.

PLAINTIFF DONNA TREVETHAN'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Certification Of Settlement Class.

The matter is called. DISCUSSIONS are held on the issues raised by the Court in the tentative ruling:

1. The proposed class action settlement agreement provides for notice to class members solely by first-class mail (Section IX(A)). The Court cannot find that notice to class members by first-class mail only is the best notice practicable. Notice must be provided both by first-class mail and by email, if available. In addition, the settlement administrator shall make available on the website, in addition to the proposed settlement agreement, the pleadings, the class notice, and information regarding the final fairness hearing. The proposed settlement agreement must be amended accordingly.

2. The Court also notes that it will not approve an incentive award to the class representative without a detailed factual showing regarding her participation in the litigation. (See In re Cellphone Termination Fee Cases (2010) 186 Cal.App.4th 1380, 1394-1395.) In addition, the Court will not approve a final award of attorneys' fees without a factual showing by counsel sufficient to allow a lodestar cross-check. (See Laffitte v. Robert Half International, Inc. (2016) 1 Cal.5th 480, 505-506.)

At the conclusion of discussions, PLAINTIFF DONNA TREVETHAN'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Certification Of Settlement Class is continued to April 14, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302. A short declaration authenticating a signed amendment addressing the issues raised by the Court is to be filed by the close of business on April 13, 2021. Setting of the final approval hearing is reserved until April 14, 2021. Counsel should be prepared to discuss the scheduling of the final approval hearing on that date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
